body_txt:
A specific example of Power Perversion Potential . Almost every time a male — and it is always a male — gets trapped in some kind of Gender Bender situation, the first thing the man-turned-woman does is check out the new equipment, usually by fondling their new breasts or stripping down to check themselves out. In front of a mirror, if one is available. Often a form of Fanservice and Distracted by My Own Sexy . The character will engage in the following sequence of actions: This may be related to the famous Five Stages of Grief : Denial, Anger, Bargaining, Depression, and Acceptance. But with a greater focus on boobies. Occasionally shortened to the simple: Females-turned-male will almost never do the equivalent with their new equipment. Considering that this trope is primarily about the breasts as opposed to the vagina, it's somewhat a false equivalency; but still, Most Writers Are Male , so male self-pleasuring isn't cool . Alternatively, All Women Are Prudes who would be too disgusted to engage in such a thing, while All Men Are Perverts who will engage in this trope regardless of what they think about the transformation (or even before they think about it).
Females-turned-male may , however, exploit their new ability to pee standing up, but that situation usually only comes up after-the-fact (and only if Nobody Poops isn't in effect). Also, females-turned-female might fall into this trope on rare occasion, if said female was previously too young or too flat . If a "Freaky Friday" Flip occurs between people of the opposite sex, the female will typically warn the male currently wearing her body not to do this. Compare Showing Off the New Body (a completely different situation that results in similar behavior), Sweet on Polly Oliver (where men are confused or disgusted by their attraction to another "guy") and Breaking In Old Habits (taking new hands for a "test drive"). May overlap with Reveling in the New Form . A rare G-rated version may occur if the male-turned-female character intentionally experiments with stereotypically female behavior or clothing (see the Third Law of Gender-Bending ). This might be a humorous subversion (playing dress up instead of playing with yourself) or a form of G-Rated Masturbation when the trope can't or shouldn't be demonstrated explicitly. The Trope Namer is a Shania Twain song, which has nothing at all to do with this trope .
